_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: MEK inhibition significantly decreased tumor growth in all of the MPNST lines, yet substantial response heterogeneity was observed in the NF1-MET and NF1-P53 tumors
details: Significantly decreased tumor growth in all MPNST lines with substantial response heterogeneity in NF1-MET and NF1-P53 tumors
